title: Forest Survival Treehouse
description: Adds a small forest treehouse, ideal for early game survival
body:
**Forest Survival Treehouse**

This mod adds a small Treehouse to the game, perfect for starting out and staying safe during your first nights.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9d0418632e7d360b0b2dd3a8990fe643633affe.jpeg)

Inside, you’ll find useful loot and materials to help you on your adventure:

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ec01592833e146494be620f11cb8fb9c57819c3.jpeg)

- The Treehouse can spawn in forest and flower forest biomes.
- Chests feature custom loot tables, making the mod also compatible with the Lootr mod.


feel free to put it in your modpack!
